steps.title: Identify the consequence
steps.content: The sentence after the blank describes what happens as a result of the plurality rule just explained: if multiple candidates compete, a winner with under 50% becomes possible. The transition must signal this logical consequence.

steps.title: Match the consequence signal
steps.content: ”Accordingly” expresses consequence: the final sentence logically flows from the plurality system described above. The other three misidentify the relationship by suggesting contrast, addition, or analogy rather than consequence. That matches choice D — D is correct.
